description: The PlaneTranslationGizmo component is used to make the 3 plane axes on a translation gizmo for moving a slot using the dev tip. Used to move objects along a flat plane. Auto generated by the game.

fields.AutoPositionAtTargetSlot: Whether to auto position this gizmo at the specified slot.
fields._interactingComponent: the component That is interacting with this.
fields._material: The material being used to show this gizmo.
fields._toolPoint: The tool tip that is controlling this gizmo.
fields._activePoint: The point for this gizmo when using tip instead of projection for the interacting tooltip.
fields._lineRoot: The root slot of the visual being used when doing tip instead of Projection for the interacting tooltip.
fields._lineSegment: The mesh being used for the line visual.
fields._snapHighlight: The root of the snap highlight visual sphere.
fields.PointSpace: The transform space of the field this is modifying.
fields.Normal: The normal of where this plane gizmo should be pointing for its normal.
fields.NormalSpace: The transform space the normal is defined in.
fields.UseCustomVisual: Whether to use a custom visual for this gizmo.
fields._customVisualRoot: The root slot of the custom visual.
fields.HandleSize: The size of the plane used for interacting with this component.
fields.HandleOffset: The offset of the plane used for interacting with this component.
fields.CreateUndoSteps: Whether to create Undo steps for interacting with this gizmo.
fields._visualRoot: The root slot of the visual of this gizmo.
fields._visualRotation: The rotation field of this Gizmos visual.
fields._visualPosition: The position field of this gizmo's visual.
fields._boxSize: The size of the box mesh being used for this visual.
fields._linesRoot: The root slot for the tip projection lines visual.
fields._line0: The first line for this gizmo when interacting via tip instead of Projection with a dev tip.
fields._line1: The second line for this gizmo when interacting via tip instead of Projection with a dev tip.
fields._collider: The collider for interacting with this gizmo.
